svg.title: Apple Silicon LLM Monitoring — Data Flow
svg.desc: End-to-end data flow diagram. Hardware and LLM telemetry metrics travel from Mac Mini nodes through OTEL Collector agents and a central gateway into Prometheus storage, then to Grafana dashboards. Alerts route from Prometheus to Alertmanager. Data flows left to right: Collection → OTEL Agent → Gateway → Storage → Visualization.
svg.text: Apple Silicon LLM Monitoring — Data Flow
COLLECTION → OTEL AGENT → GATEWAY → STORAGE → VISUALIZATION
